title: Update for https://github.com/containers/image/pull/1299 + update tests
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

> /kind feature

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Update c/image from a WIP https://github.com/containers/image/pull/1299:
- to eventually benefit from the better error messages
- for now, to exercise that PR to find issues, if any
- for now, to see if any Buildah tests need adjusting.

#### How to verify it

Existing tests

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```

comments.body: @mtrmac This PR needs to be rebased or closed.

@rhatdan This contains test updates that we will need to apply to Buildah soon after the c/image PR merges.

The next step is to review and merge https://github.com/containers/image/pull/1299 . Short-term, waiting after the 4.3 branching and/or release might be better, to decrease risk of last-minute instability.

c/image has now been updated, and vendoring that will break Buildah tests.

So, please review/merge this PR, so that Buildah tests match c/image and future vendor dances don’t stumble on the test failures.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *flouthoc*, *mtrmac*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fbuildah). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [flouthoc,rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
